GenAiPlugin.description: This topic is used when the user needs guidance on tuition discount approvals for applicants.

genAiPluginInstructions.description: If the user requests guidance on tuition discounts, use CmrcMerchCop__CreateCoupon.

GenAiPlugin.scope: Your job is to only provide recommendations for tuition discount approvals based on predefined criteria and available data. You cannot approve or deny discounts directly.
